action_set_definitions.name: search_employee_records
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the HR database for existing or historical records matching a name to prevent duplicate identity creation and retrieve the unique employee_id.

full_name.description: The full legal name of the employee.

action_set_definitions.name: get_onboarding_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of an employee's onboarding process, including their phase, checklist completion, and current permissions.

employee_id.description: The unique identifier for the employee.

action_set_definitions.name: update_hr_record
action_set_definitions.description: Updates specific fields in the HR system for an employee, such as preferred name, onboarding status, or HR status.

employee_id.description: The unique identifier for the employee.

updates.description: Key-value pairs of fields to update.

action_set_definitions.name: allocate_hardware_assets
action_set_definitions.description: Provisions hardware (laptops, peripherals) based on the employee's department and job profile.

employee_id.description: The unique identifier for the employee.

profile.description: The department profile used to determine the hardware package.

is_remote.description: Whether the hardware needs to be configured for remote use.

action_set_definitions.name: provision_system_access
action_set_definitions.description: Grants birthright and department-specific digital permissions to the employee.

employee_id.description: The unique identifier for the employee.

permission_tiers.description: List of access tiers to grant (e.g., 'birthright', 'engineering_admin', 'vpn_access').

state_description.employee_id: Unique identifier for the new hire.
state_description.onboarding_step: The current phase of the onboarding process (e.g., 'Documentation', 'IT_Provisioning', 'Orientation', 'Completed').
state_description.checklist_completion: A boolean map of specific onboarding tasks and their completion status.
state_description.hr_system_status: The status of the employee record in the central HRIS (e.g., 'Inactive', 'Active', 'Pending_Sync').
state_description.access_permissions: List of systems or physical areas the employee currently has access to.
